name: @prefig/upact-ember
description: upact adapter for ember presence credentials. Verifier-side: offline Ed25519 chain-of-renewal verification, encounter-bound sessions, the first shipped 'represence' lifecycle. Substrate: @prefig/ember.
author: Theodore Evans
